Off Calendar Mar-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- KEVIN SINGER, TEL. NO. 848-2984, RECEIVER OF THE RECEIVERSHIP SPECIALISTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - KEVIN SINGER AS RECEIVER Motion For Orders 1. Approving The Parties Stipulation Regarding Discharge Of Receiver 2. Approving And Settling Receiver'S Final Report And Account 3. For Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Receiver 4. Exonerating All Bonds 5. Ratifying All The Other Receiver'S Acts And Transactions 6. Retaining Jurisdiction Re Receivership IS GRANTED. MR. SINGER REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT THERE WAS AN ORDER GRANTING RELIEF FROM AUTOMATIC STAY SIGNED BY JUDGE DENNIS MONTALI OF THE BANKRUPTCY COURT FILED ON MARCH 13, 2009. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED IN THIS CASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
